## Problem
<!-- What use case isn't supported today? Be concrete about the workflow or compliance need. -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- What should the engine do? Sketch the API surface, model changes, or adapter additions. -->

## Use cases
<!-- Which deployments benefit? PRC? State Medicaid? Foster care? -->

## ADR considerations

- [ ] Does this introduce a new architectural decision worth an ADR?
- [ ] Does it touch tenancy / isolation (ADR 0002)?
- [ ] Does it affect PHI handling (ADR 0003)?
- [ ] Does it change the identifier convention (ADR 0001)?

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What else did you think about? Why is this the right approach? -->
